title: Custom eggless cakes at Riverstone — for Marsden Park and Schofields
summary:
Marsden Park and Schofields are two of Sydney's fastest-growing suburbs. Finding a custom eggless cake nearby has been the gap.

Num Nums Bakery at Riverstone Shopping Centre fills it. We bake 100% eggless — not some cakes, every cake, every time. Six sizes, 15 flavours, any design you send us. Buttercream, fondant, or ganache.

Order via WhatsApp: +61 425 697 725. 48 hours minimum notice. Free parking at the shopping centre.
keywords: can't find custom vegetarian cake near Marsden Park
